arts.ttl: Alphonso Davies credits defensive teammates as Bayern Munich decision looms
arts.sum: The Canadian men’s national team star is flourishing at left-back under first-year Bayern coach Vincent Kompany, and he has perhaps never looked as comfortable or in sync with his back line — even though he spends much of his time venturing forward. “I think both of them [center-backs Kim Min-jae and Dayot Upamecano] are incredible players,” Davies declared in a Bundesliga.com interview last week (as captured via @iMiaSanMia ).

arts.ttl: Bayer Leverkusen close on Bayern Munich while French giants suffer cup woe
arts.sum: In Italy, Juventus were held to their 13th draw in 20 Serie A games this season.

arts.ttl: Kane scores to extend Bayern's lead at top
arts.sum: Watch highlights as Harry Kane scores a penalty as Bayern Munich beat Borussia Monchengladbach to extend their lead at the top of the Bundesliga to four points.

arts.ttl: Bayer Leverkusen continue pursuit of Bayern Munich with narrow Mainz win
arts.sum: Alejandro Grimaldo's stunning free-kick was the difference as Bayer Leverkusen kept the pressure on Bundesliga leaders Bayern Munich with victory over Mainz. Patrik Schick of Leverkusen attempts to round Mainz goalkeeper Robin Zentner in a one-on-one situation - IMAGO/BEAUTIFUL SPORTS/Axel Kohring

arts.ttl: Mathys Tel, undeterred, wants Bayern Munich stay amid Chelsea interest
arts.sum: As of now, nothing has changed in Mathys Tel’s plan: he wants to stay at FC Bayern despite the concrete interest from Chelsea. Bayern Munich ’s transfer interest in Chelsea FC ’s Christopher Nkunku has come like a bolt from the blue.

arts.ttl: As showdown on the pitch looms, Bayern Munich exec blows off talk of Hoffenheim’s Tom Bischof
arts.sum: For weeks now, Bayern Munich has been linked to Hoffenheim midfielder Tom Bischof. Bayern Munich is absolutely more focused on the result of its match against Hoffenheim, but it is safe to say that the club bosses will have at least one eye on Bischof as he tries to take their team down.

arts.ttl: 20:30 kick offs: Frankfurt and Wolfsburg run riot, Leverkusen keep pressure on Bayern
arts.sum: In a hectic evening across the Bundesliga, Eintracht Frankfurt comfortably secured three points at home as their Champions League charge continues, whilst reigning champions Bayer Leverkusen keep the pressure on Bayern München and Wolfsburg ran riot against Borussia Mönchengladbach, scoring five in an emphatic victory.

arts.ttl: Training Report: Bayern Munich’s Jamal Musiala might not start vs. Hoffenheim; Kim Min-jae, Josip Stanišić return to team training, but Joshua Kimmich, Serge Gnabry work out individually
arts.sum: Bayern Munich star Jamal Musiala took part in team training for the second consecutive day, but the attacking midfielder is not certain to retake his spot in the starting XI per Bild (as captured by @iMiaSanMia ): Joshua Kimmich and Serge Gnabry did not take part in the final team training and worked indoors instead.

arts.ttl: Who is Chelsea target Mathys Tel? Signed for £25m by Bayern Munich aged 17, the forward has been mentored by Harry Kane and is dating a Miss Universe candidate
arts.sum: Tel has been a long-term target for the Blues, with the 19-year-old having been viewed as one of the best young forwards in the game, having been snapped for £25m by Bayern in 2022.

arts.ttl: Bavarian Podcast Works — Preview Show: Bayern Munich vs. Hoffenheim (Bundesliga)
arts.sum: Bayern Munich will be looking to improve upon its 1-0 victory over Gladbach last weekend and should have a chance against a reeling Hoffenheim squad. Bayern Munich is hosting a struggling Hoffenheim side for a Bundesliga showdown with a squad that has simply not gotten on track during this campaign.
